subcodes.first_line: O peoples of the earth! Hearken unto that which the Tongue of Grandeur uttereth from the most exalted station, for He remembereth you through His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض اسمعوا ما ینطق به لسان العظمه فی اعلی المقام انه یذکرکم بفضله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
